productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Black Clima Low Shoes
description: Style NoteWhen only the most stylish footwear-option will do choose these TC Clima Low shoes from adidas. The high-tech breathable sole will ensure your feet stay cool while you're shooting hoops on the Basketball court.Product DetailsBlack shoe with central lace-ups, synthetic overlays, reinforced overlay on the heel counter and mesh panels on the mouthPadded and meshed tongue and innerMoulded EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and orthoLite® performance insoles giving 'comfort from the inside out'Durable non-marking rubber outsole diagonal pattern lattice and outsole and midsole have airways to allow the sole of your foot to breatheMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
